narrative:
Precinct Conneaut 4-A (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 387 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.5 percentage points.
